#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace MainApp
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from MainApp.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MainAppServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddMainApp(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddTransient<global::MainApp.Mediator, global::MainApp.Mediator>();
            }

            if (tags.Contains("Mediator"))
            {
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<>), typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<>));
                services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<>), typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<>));
                services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<global::MainApp.Entity1>, global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<global::MainApp.Entity1>>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule.IRequestHandler<global::MainApp.GenericRequest1<global::MainApp.Entity1>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::MainApp.Entity1>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler1<global::MainApp.Entity1>>());
                services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>, global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule.IRequestHandler<global::MainApp.GenericRequest2<global::MainApp.Entity2>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::MainApp.Entity2>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>>());
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
